chapter_title.ar: باب مَوَارِيثِ الْقَتْلَى وَ مَنْ يَرِثُ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ وَ مَنْ لَا يَرِثُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 34 – Inheritances of the murdered, and who would inherit from the wergild (blood money compensation), and who would not inherit

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/207)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/207)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُهُ هَلْ لِلْإِخْوَةِ مِنَ الْأُمِّ مِنَ الدِّيَةِ شَيْ‏ءٌ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Dawood Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Al Abbas,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Is there anything for the brothers from the mother from the wergild?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from Dawud ibn al- Haseen from abu al-‘Abbas who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if brothers from mother’s side can receive any inheritance from the wergild. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, they cannot do so.’”
